reviews.author: Dayana Stoycheva
reviews.text:
Excellent financial advice from Ms. Sidiqi!

I had the pleasure of receiving financial advice from Ms. Sidiqi, and I am absolutely thrilled. She takes her time, listens carefully, and explains even complex topics clearly. Thanks to her expert and personalized guidance, I now have a much clearer understanding of how to best manage my finances.

I was particularly impressed by her patience and dedication to finding the best solution for my situation. I wholeheartedly recommend Ms. Sidiqi and will gladly contact her again in the future.

Thank you so much for your wonderful support!

reviews.author: Christina Nani
reviews.text: Unfortunately, I discovered that the advice I received from Ms. Sediqi Saltanat did not meet my expectations. Her recommendations were inaccurate and led me to make the wrong decision. In comparison, I received significantly better offers and much more competent advice from another advisor. Fortunately, Ergo Versicherung also has employees who work with great dedication and expertise to provide their clients with accurate and reliable advice. Unfortunately, this was not the case with Ms. Sediqi.

reviews.text: We recently became new customers of Ergo. We met Mr. Klinkmüller through a roundabout way. We felt comfortable with him right from our initial consultation. His competence, experience, expertise, and friendliness quickly convinced us that we had made the right choice with Ergo.

reviews.text: Thank you! :-) Ms. Pokrandt and I took out a supplemental dental insurance policy that's a perfect fit for me: it's inexpensive but covers everything. Plus, she found exactly what makes sense for me – without any unnecessary frills, which is unfortunately often the case with other providers.

reviews.author: Karim Ben Mansur
reviews.text:
I made my switch to private health insurance with Ms. Pokrandt – and I can only say positive things! 🙏 From the first consultation to the final conclusion, everything went smoothly. She was available at all times, answered all my questions super quickly, and really made me feel like I was in good hands.

I particularly liked the fact that she didn't just "sell" me something, but really addressed my individual needs. No empty promises, no pressure – just competent, honest advice at eye level.

For anyone considering a new insurance setup: I can wholeheartedly recommend Ms. Pokrandt!

I will now also take out my private pension plan with her – she showed me some really exciting ETFs that make a lot of sense, especially for my self-employment.

reviews.author: Emma Reinedahl
reviews.text:
I am completely satisfied with the consultation provided by Ms. Pokrandt. I was particularly impressed by her honest and transparent approach – she didn't try to sell me anything, but rather found individually tailored solutions for me.

reviews.text:
I would like to express my sincere gratitude to Mr. Stefan Debes for his outstanding service. He is an extremely dedicated, friendly, and professional contact person. In my insurance claim, he took the time to listen attentively, meticulously document everything, and reliably pursue the matter with ERGO.

I was particularly pleasantly surprised that the claim was settled so smoothly and a payment was made – something one often doesn't expect from insurance companies. Mr. Debes showed me that ERGO can do things differently: customer-oriented, fair, and solution-focused.

Thank you very much for the excellent service!

Perfect as always, all questions, problems, and ambiguities were clarified and resolved competently and quickly to our complete satisfaction. The claim was also settled within a very short time. What more could you want? We've been completely satisfied for well over 20 years and will definitely not switch to anyone else.

For decades, he has been my go-to person for legal protection matters. Absolutely reliable, competent, dedicated, and customer-focused. His enthusiasm for his work has never waned, which is why I have recommended Mr. Maschmann many times with complete conviction.

His integrity is a prime example of perfect customer service in the insurance sector, one that many colleagues should emulate.

reviews.text: Ms. Cheung provided us with very friendly, competent, and thorough advice regarding our contracts and responded promptly to our inquiries by phone or in writing. We found working with Ms. Cheung to be very pleasant.

reviews.author: Jonas Rainer Meyer
reviews.text:
After being rather disappointed with several insurance agencies, I ended up with Ms. Cheung thanks to a recommendation.
She is highly competent, absolutely professional, and pays attention to many details, as well as everything else. She is also completely reliable and dedicated.

I rarely write reviews, but my praise for Ms. Cheung absolutely has to be shared here. Especially for self-employed individuals and business owners, Ms. Cheung is a highly recommended contact for insurance matters.

reviews.author: trombone
reviews.text: Ms. Cheung has been performing outstanding and competent work for years. She is highly motivated, thinks long-term, and is fair. Her meticulous work style benefits all parties involved: the insurer, the insured community, and the customer.

reviews.author: Christian Brieskorn
reviews.text: As a small business and private customer, I have been served by Ms. Cheung since 2009. Her advice and recommendations are always thorough and well-founded, and are also qualified for companies. The well-being of the policyholder is more important to her than taking out as many policies as possible. She only recommends what she believes in. If a claim arises, she doesn't cover the costs, but instead helps with the paperwork. Although I actually prefer direct insurance, it is ONLY because of Ms. Cheung that I have continued with Ergo. For me, she is the epitome of a "good" insurance agent, the ideal way an agent should be.

reviews.author: Andreas Bernhardt
reviews.text: Ms. Cheung is a very competent and nice consultant who takes the time to go through different scenarios, answer questions and follow up if there is still any uncertainty.

reviews.author: Dennis Manuel
reviews.text: On the day the offer was prepared, interest was shown over the phone. Weeks later, when I wanted to take out legal insurance, there was initially no response to my voicemail messages. I had to chase them down as a customer to get a contract, and on the day the contract was finalized, they stopped responding to emails and calls. Such behavior towards new customers is quite rude. A complaint has been filed with Ergo's management/department head. This experience has once again shown me that we live in a cutthroat, dog-eat-dog world.

reviews.author: Matthias Hüls
reviews.text:
Excellent advice, pleasant and reliable contact!

Highly recommended!

reviews.author: Bettina Kühl
reviews.text: I saw Ms. Cheung yesterday. She promptly sent me the necessary documents by email beforehand. The consultation in person was very friendly and professional. I felt very well taken care of. The office is on the first floor, and the building doesn't have an elevator. However, home visits are available upon request. Thank you very much.

He has a knack for explaining complex insurance topics clearly and understandably, and his calm, trustworthy manner quickly earns the confidence of his clients. As a reliable and dedicated employee, he is a true asset to ERGO.

reviews.author: March ninety five
reviews.text:
As someone with little knowledge of insurance, I felt I received excellent advice from Mr. Rafeh.

He explained everything clearly and really took his time.

The conversations were transparent and friendly. Thank you very much!

reviews.author: Farah Monzer
reviews.text:
Highly competent, helpful, and absolutely reliable.

Mr. Rafeh took the time to explain everything clearly and addressed my individual situation.

I felt very well advised. Highly recommended!

reviews.author: Farah
reviews.text:
Mr. Rafeh distinguished himself through his expertise and calm, structured consultation.

His honest assessment and focus on the essentials, without any sales pressure, are particularly noteworthy.

Consultation just as one would hope for.

reviews.author: Marvin Seuffet
reviews.text: Highly competent and honest advice from Mr. Taylor Tonyi. Quick responses, clear explanations, and reliable service. A clear recommendation!

reviews.author: Norbert Klose
reviews.text: They processed and forwarded my claim immediately. The addendum was also forwarded very quickly and processed by ERGO without delay. I am extremely satisfied.

reviews.author: Niklas Knupper

reviews.author: Samuel Aguda
reviews.text: Highly competent advice. You can tell they have the expertise and are in good hands in every area.

reviews.author: Tim F
reviews.text: Mr. Tonyi provided me with excellent investment advice. He explains everything clearly and offers tailored solutions. The investment was also very profitable in the year following the initial investment. I feel I received excellent support and can highly recommend him.

reviews.author: B 80
reviews.text:
I switched to Mr. Fallapp years ago. Mr. Fallapp helped me regain trust in insurance agents. Trust in him. His advice is honest and goes beyond the typical work of an insurance agent. He's also a great person.

In times of need, I get quick help. Ergo's online portal still needs some development, but Mr. Fallapp is always a great help there as well.

If Mr. Fallapp were to change insurance companies, I would go with him! An insurance company is only ever as good as its advisors – you can tell when someone is willing to go the extra mile and doesn't just see customers as a number in a portal or try to meet a quota!

reviews.author: Andrea F.
reviews.text:
I've been a client of Mr. Fallapp's for years. His advice is highly competent, professional, and friendly. Over the years, our contracts have been easily adapted to our changing life circumstances. We've always received excellent and objective support.

Thank you, Mr. Fallapp.

reviews.author: A. E.
reviews.text: Empathetic, organized, and easily accessible. As a customer, I always feel I receive excellent and personalized advice. The ERGO products fit perfectly and are explained very clearly by Mr. Fallapp. Thank you for many years of outstanding service!

reviews.author: Marco Faustmann
reviews.text:
Mr. Fallap is always available and provides thorough and honest explanations!

I've never felt pressured to buy something I don't need!

reviews.author: Karsten Böde
reviews.text: Mr. Fallap provides excellent advice on investment and insurance matters. Even given my residence in Bielefeld, everything always runs smoothly.

reviews.author: Hartmuth Koch
reviews.text: I would like to sincerely thank Mr. Kock for his outstanding advice and excellent service, which he has provided to us for many years. His consultation was highly competent and tailored to my individual needs. Mr. Kock took ample time to explain various insurance options and their details, helping me find the most suitable policies. Mr. Kock and his office were also always quick and reliable in handling inquiries and claims. I feel very well taken care of by Mr. Kock and can recommend him without reservation.

reviews.author: Barbara Felske
reviews.text: Mr. Andre Kock does his job exceptionally well. He approaches it with enthusiasm and dedication. He has always been quick to help me with any problems I've encountered. What I particularly appreciate about him is that he doesn't try to sell you anything you don't need, unlike some other people. He has been looking after me for several years now, and I am very satisfied.

reviews.author: Kai V.
reviews.text: I have only positive things to say about Mr. Kock. He is very competent in his field and always explains the individual insurance policies in detail. Mr. Kock is always ready to listen and is always there to help and advise, and he really takes excellent care of his customers. He deserves 5 stars!

reviews.author: manuela paasch
reviews.text:
I am very satisfied with André Kock. He is very responsive to requests and ideas and truly gives his best.

He answers calls and WhatsApp messages immediately and always makes time, no matter the time.

Mr. Kock can, no, must be highly recommended as a very pleasant and helpful representative!

He is a pleasant, relaxed person who clearly enjoys his work.

Keep it up! 🙂

reviews.author: Stephan Milbradt
reviews.text: Mr. Kock is a highly competent contact person for us when it comes to insurance matters. He is always informative, knowledgeable, friendly, and helpful. He provides objective and goal-oriented advice and support with damages or claims. Thanks to the trusting relationship we have with him, we feel very well taken care of.

reviews.author: Anna S
reviews.text:
I am absolutely dissatisfied with the service from this insurance company. Initially, I was optimistic, and mistakes can happen.

They made false promises regarding the insurance, which only came to light after the vehicle had been purchased, registered, and insured, and the car was almost deregistered again due to the insurance company's error. Furthermore, they didn't keep their word and couldn't rely on them. They also rarely, if ever, responded.

Absolutely not recommended. A real shame.

reviews.author: Bennett Schreiber
reviews.text: Mr. Golunski provided me with excellent support and assistance during the insurance process.

reviews.author: Tilman Schulz
reviews.text: Excellent advice and support from Mr. Golunski!

reviews.author: Serdo Eryilmaz
reviews.text:
I received excellent, expert advice from Mr. Agbakoko. My individual needs were addressed thoroughly. Even with urgent questions, I always received a detailed answer quickly and without any time pressure.

Recommendations were offered and discussed in detail.

That's precisely why I placed my complete trust in Mr. Agbakoko some time ago and switched all my insurance policies, etc., to him. And now, thanks to Mr. Agbakoko, my next property financing is already in the starting blocks.

reviews.author: Cenk Altun
reviews.text: Collin Agbakoko exceeded my expectations! He is professional, competent, and dedicated. Communication was always clear and friendly. Collin took the time to understand my needs and offer customized solutions. I always felt well looked after and can recommend his first-class advice to anyone!

reviews.author: Malcolm Turay
reviews.text:
I don't usually comment; I prefer to give ratings using the star system.

I've been insured with Ergo through Mr. Agbakoko for over two years now. Unlike my previous insurance advisors, Mr. Agbakoko has always made me feel confident and in good hands. His customer service skills and expertise are, as of now, unmatched. I can wholeheartedly recommend Mr. Agbakoko to anyone who, like me, has little to moderate knowledge of insurance – 5/5 stars.

reviews.author: Nassir Khan
reviews.text:
Excellent service and personalized advice! 👍🏽

I've been a client of Mr. Agbakoko for several years and can highly recommend his team. The advice is always personal and tailored to my individual needs. Whether it's about a new insurance policy, adjusting existing policies, or handling a claim – I always feel well taken care of and have the feeling that my interests are their top priority. 🙂

I particularly appreciate their expertise and the clear explanations of the various options they offer. The team takes the time to answer all my questions and explore different scenarios, so I feel well-informed before making a decision.

Even in difficult situations, such as a claim, the insurance agency has proven to be very reliable and quick. The process was straightforward, and I was kept informed of the progress at all times.

Overall, I feel I'm in excellent hands with Mr. Agbakoko and his colleagues and have complete confidence in their expertise. I can wholeheartedly recommend this agency.

reviews.author: Taylan Günes
reviews.text:
Professional, straightforward, flexible, and customer-focused. These are exemplary qualities that Mr. Agbakoko can boast of.
His constant care and helpfulness are emblematic of his passionate commitment to his profession, which has made me a highly satisfied, happy, and well-insured customer!
Highly recommended for professional matters of any kind!

reviews.author: Linda Leest
reviews.text:
In 2020, I switched three insurance policies to ERGO. Since DKV also belongs to ERGO, I was now bound to this company with four policies. From that time until today, I've had three different contacts who were constantly changing, but they were never reachable and therefore couldn't offer me any help.

On February 21, 2024, I was notified of another agency change. The letter confirmed the enthusiasm of the ERGO Bremen regional office for answering all my questions about my policies. However, since I've had my share of problems with ERGO, I immediately picked up the phone and dialed the number provided. A very pleasant voice answered. And that voice belonged to David Khan. Since that phone call, I've been receiving excellent service from Mr. Khan.

Mr. Khan also convinced me to take out the Accident Assistance Plus policy, and I fully embraced it.

For me, as an older lady, it's a pleasure to be served by Mr. Khan.

reviews.author: Skur Skur
reviews.text: Competent and very friendly, Mr. Khan handled my claim for damage caused by a broken cable very quickly, and communication throughout was excellent. Thank you very much!

reviews.author: Michelle Trinh
reviews.text: Excellent all-round advice, understandable and transparent!

reviews.author: Pekka Kämäräinen
reviews.text: The best service and advice that one can ever expect. Einfach Klasse!

reviews.author: Veysel Barasi
reviews.text:
Excellent advice from Mr. Sohrab Sayahi!

From the initial consultation to the finalization of my home insurance policy, everything was explained clearly and professionally. He is always available, responds extremely quickly, and provides immediate assistance. You simply feel well taken care of. Highly recommended!

reviews.author: Pia Schröder
reviews.text:
Mr. Sayahi was always available, responded quickly, and worked very reliably. My liability claim was recorded immediately and processed within a few days. With other insurance companies, you often have to wait months.

Highly recommended!

reviews.author: Karim Dekkar
reviews.text: The insurance agency provided me with excellent advice on all matters relating to private health insurance, retirement planning, and investment funds. Despite the complicated situation after several years abroad, everything was incredibly easy and transparent. Competent, reliable, and with all the necessary expertise in-house – you truly feel you're in good hands here. A big thank you to Mr. Agbakoko and Mr. Sayahi for the outstanding advice. Highly recommended!

reviews.author: Tim Haake
reviews.text:
Sohrab's team provides competent and respectful advice. You never get the feeling that they're trying to push or sell you anything.
Your wishes and preferences were treated with the utmost respect.

I would gladly use their services again!

reviews.author: Majin
reviews.text: Mr. Teske has been supporting me on my journey for some time now, and I'm thrilled. I always receive excellent advice, multiple suggested solutions for my personal protection, and questions always receive quick, competent answers! We started when I was single, and now we're married with two children and a pet – without exception, we've received excellent, individualized care! Mr. Teske is never pushy or intrusive, as I was used to before I was insured with him. He's patient until I understand everything, no matter how many times I ask. Very personable and humorous, to boot. Very child-friendly, especially with my now very demanding toddlers – a plus! And very modern and straightforward when it comes to advice/contracts. Never anywhere else!

reviews.author: Carina Drewes
reviews.text: I contacted Mr. Teske because I was no longer satisfied with my old insurance advisor and no longer trusted him. Mr. Teske showed me that not all insurance agents are just out for money. He listened to my needs and gave me excellent advice, especially regarding private health insurance. I highly recommend Mr. Teske to anyone. He listens to every concern from start to finish and tries to find a good solution. Thank you for the excellent advice.

reviews.author: Alexandra Schulze
reviews.text: Elias Teske is the man you need for sound advice on insurance and finance. I've been a client for many years and contacted Mr. Teske because I unfortunately lacked prior knowledge in these areas and didn't know what to look out for. There are many advisors in this industry, but someone as competent as Mr. Teske is rare!

reviews.author: Erika Suvorov
reviews.text:
Five stars are definitely warranted here! 👍🏼 First-class advice, and no questions remain unanswered.

Mr. Teske is an excellent consultant with outstanding expertise who supports his clients with great dedication.

Keep up the good work! Thank you! ⭐️

reviews.author: Karolin Rickert
reviews.text: I am very satisfied with Mr. Teske. He advises me in several areas and is always very easy to reach. When I had car damage, Mr. Teske was immediately available and able to answer all my questions right away. Highly recommended!

reviews.author: Harald Ohlrogge
reviews.text: I would like to take this opportunity to express my complete satisfaction with the consultation and especially with the prompt responses. I will continue to place my full trust in this agency and Mr. Bleeke in the future.

reviews.author: samer Alsheikh
reviews.text: A nice person who loves his work. The dealings between us were very good. He carefully explains everything you need and is honest in his dealings. I definitely recommend him.

reviews.author: Semih Deneyen
reviews.text:
I am completely satisfied with the advice and service. Mr. Scholz truly took the time to understand my situation and find suitable solutions – without pressure, but with genuine expertise and transparency. I was particularly pleased that everything was explained clearly and that I felt in good hands at all times.
Even after the contract has been signed, the service is first-class: prompt feedback, clear answers, and genuine support in the event of a claim.
This is what customer service should look like – thank you for your outstanding work!

reviews.author: F. H.
reviews.text: I've been insured with Ergo for several years now. Mr. Scholz has been my contact person in Bremen for quite some time. Unfortunately, we hadn't yet managed to meet in person. Now we've finally done so. Mr. Scholz took a lot of time, and together we went through my policy documents. He explained everything clearly and even sent me the documents we'd discussed afterward. You can tell Mr. Scholz knows what he's talking about!

reviews.author: Semra Puchtler
reviews.text: I've been with Ergo Insurance for a long time and can wholeheartedly recommend Mr. Scholz. He provides excellent advice, is friendly, and always has time to listen. Mr. Scholz is competent and absolutely reliable. Thank you very much.

reviews.author: George Brown
reviews.text: The ERGO team is simply fantastic. Competent, professional, and patient. They went through the entire contract with me point by point and made sure I fully understood all the details. I came to them on a recommendation and will recommend them to others as well.

reviews.author: Harry O'Connor
reviews.text: Mr. Uhde gave me very honest advice. I felt very well taken care of, and all my questions were answered down to the smallest detail. You simply can't get better service or friendliness, hence 5 stars.

reviews.author: Emily S.
reviews.text:
Everything was wonderfully friendly, competent, and straightforward. They didn't offer anything you didn't actually need. Highly recommended!

I should also mention that the office location is excellent. (Parking is available behind the building.)

reviews.author: Michael
reviews.text:
Hello,

I usually keep quiet about things like this and therefore don't want to go into too much detail. Unfortunately, I can only give it one star overall, and even that's too much. Not recommended! We're canceling our subscription!

November 1, 2019 Reply to the owner's message: After more than a year, I finally get a reply, and it's even copied from a template!

Since we were very upset at the time, you should remember us, unless you frequently have disgruntled customers, but I can't judge that since I'm only speaking for ourselves.

reviews.text: We felt comfortable with Mr. Coban throughout our time with him and always felt that he was acting in our best interests. He was always available to listen and offered advice and support. Thank you for the excellent collaboration, and we look forward to the future.

reviews.text: I've been insured through Ergo with Marc Schmidt for many years, covering all my insurance needs. But not because Ergo makes the difference, but because of Marc Schmidt. I can wholeheartedly recommend him.

reviews.author: Dennis Göttsche
reviews.text: I arranged an appointment quickly and easily. The advice I received was very friendly and competent. Before finalizing any insurance policies, everything was explained in detail – what was covered and what wasn't. They also helped me connect me with other contacts specializing in employment law. Mr. Marc Schmidt treated me with respect at all times. I felt very comfortable here. I definitely recommend this insurance company! Keep up the good work!

reviews.author: Max Brandenburg
reviews.text: We've received excellent advice for over 10 years. Even in complex cases, we've always received the right recommendations. Communication has been flawless and direct; we've also been able to combine many insurance policies within the family to get good coverage and save money at the same time.

reviews.author: Michael Göttsche
reviews.text: I've been with ERGO for a long time and am always satisfied with Mr. Schmidt! Friendly, competent, and always quick to find a solution! It's important to me to have a contact person in every situation, unlike with an online insurance company where you might get a better deal in some areas, but you have to navigate through the entire internet and various automated systems!

reviews.author: Noemi Saini
reviews.text:
Mr. Marc Schmidt lives up to his profession: Competent and pleasant advice (not just "friendly"). A well-founded, reliable, and professional approach.
If I hadn't felt well looked after over many years, I wouldn't have signed the contract for the new car with him again. The telephone accessibility is also excellent.
The advice was always very pleasant and competent. There was no active attempt to exploit the opportunity to sell additional products. A detailed inventory of all contracts was made.
We would recommend Mr. Schmidt at any time!

reviews.author: Danny Sonntag
reviews.text:
I highly recommend Mr. Gundelach's ERGO insurance office.

I felt very well advised regarding my retirement planning. The advisor was extremely competent, took plenty of time, and explained everything clearly, without any pressure or sales tactics. I particularly appreciated the honest and transparent advice. Advantages and disadvantages were addressed openly, questions were answered patiently, and nothing was sugarcoated. You can tell that they're thinking long-term and not just aiming for a quick sale.

I absolutely cannot understand the occasional negative reviews I've read. My experience was consistently professional, trustworthy, and respectful. Anyone looking for a reliable and sustainable retirement plan will definitely find it here.

reviews.author: Andreas Pagenkopf
reviews.text: The advice and services are great! We have been a customer with various insurance products for 25 years! When necessary, we always received quick and unbureaucratic help. Everything as it should be! Keep it up!

reviews.author: Sascha Becker
reviews.text: I've been receiving insurance advice from Mr. Heydenreich for almost 30 years. Fortunately, I've had few claims, but last year I had two (approximately €5,000). One phone call to Mr. Heydenreich and I didn't have to worry about a thing. Claims settled, and that was it. Excellent!

reviews.author: Birgit Schwarz
reviews.text: As a long-standing ERGO customer, I am very satisfied with this insurance agency. Mr. Heydenreich provides expert advice and always responds very quickly to inquiries. He also offers prompt assistance in the event of a claim.

reviews.author: Manuela Meyer-Geers

We wholeheartedly and without reservation recommend him.

reviews.author: S.G.
reviews.text: My partner and I were in the office today to have our existing insurance policies reviewed and, if necessary, to switch to Ergo. I can only agree with the previous speakers. My partner and I went home feeling relieved to know our insurance policies are up to date and in the best hands. Thank you again.

reviews.author: Mirko Mindermann
reviews.text: I've been with ERGO for almost a decade, and always with a good feeling. Mr. Hüdepohl and his team are always committed to resolving everything to the customer's complete satisfaction. reviews.author: Dome Wb

reviews.author: X. Y.

Simple – Unbureaucratic – Fast – I'm thrilled with the quick and easy processing! Highly recommended and, compared to other providers, also affordable! Many thanks to Ergo / Thies Requardt!

Whether it's for a company, health insurance provider, or private insurer, we can wholeheartedly recommend him. Highly competent and pleasantly friendly! Keep up the good work!

reviews.author: Udo Wulff
reviews.text: You always receive friendly, competent, and good advice.

reviews.author: manuela
reviews.text: The glass damage claim was handled quickly and easily. We have many of our insurance policies with ERGO and are always very satisfied. Friendly, competent advice from well-trained staff. Keep up the good work with this great service and your fantastic team. Thank you!

reviews.author: Sandra Puls
reviews.text: I am completely satisfied with the Ergo insurance agency. The staff always handle my requests quickly and reliably. No matter what the issue is – I always feel I am in excellent hands.

reviews.author: Sonja Guttmann
reviews.text: For many, many years I have felt very well looked after by ERGO Insurance Patrick Schuback. A super friendly team. Many thanks to Martin Wedig for the consistently excellent advice and helpful tips – even for last-minute requests.

reviews.author: Saskia Ketelsen
reviews.text:
Mr. Wedig provided us with expert advice, prepared a very good offer, and answered all our questions promptly.

We certainly hope we never have to use this insurance, but we hope that if we do, the contact will remain just as good. Thank you.

reviews.author: Dörte Stoldt
reviews.text: I'm thrilled! It only took three business days from the damage to the repair. The process, especially with Martin Wedig, was straightforward, professional, and fast!

reviews.author: Vanessa Path
reviews.text: We are absolutely delighted with Mr. Pump. The consultation was expert, easy to understand, and perfectly tailored to our individual situation. Mr. Pump took his time, explained everything clearly, and ensured we felt we were in excellent hands. The customer truly comes first here – highly recommended!

reviews.author: Mirco Thiessen
reviews.text: Excellent advice in all areas, plus a very good price-performance ratio.

reviews.author: Moritz Kulczak
reviews.text:
Thank you very much, Mr. Pump.

Thanks to your expert advice and foresight, we were able to optimize our policies.

Mr. Pump is always reliable and friendly; his competence makes you feel very well taken care of.

M.K.

reviews.author: Karol Prokscha
reviews.text: Mr. Pump is a competent, friendly, and reliable consultant. I have already recommended him to many acquaintances.

reviews.author: Sabine
reviews.text: Mr. Pump provided very friendly and competent advice. I can recommend him without hesitation.

reviews.author: Kev MC
reviews.text:
If you need/are looking for a trustworthy insurance agent, Mr. Schaar is the right person for you.

You couldn't ask for a better insurance agent! Thank you for everything, dear Hans Jürgen!

See you very soon, the Cerol Family

reviews.text:
⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️

He always takes his time, explains everything clearly, and is available even outside of normal business hours if you have a quick question. You can immediately tell that his customers' satisfaction is truly important to him. That's what I expect from a good insurance agent – ​​a clear recommendation!

reviews.text: I've been a loyal customer for over 10 years and am very satisfied! Always very friendly and competent advice! Mr. Schaar always looks for the best solution for the customer and is very committed to doing so – I can only recommend him! Best regards

He always had a solution for every problem.

I can highly recommend him!

I highly recommend them.

reviews.author: Jan Goldbeck
reviews.text:
I've been an Ergo Insurance customer for many years and am more than satisfied with the services of my existing policies. In the event of a claim, Ms. Hexel provides quick and uncomplicated assistance.

Insurance policies are tailored to individual needs, and you never feel like you're being ripped off.

Thank you for the excellent work.

reviews.author: Die Steffens
reviews.text: Ms. Hexel-Hintze is always easily reachable and consistently competent! No question has ever gone unanswered or overlooked. We are very satisfied with our contracts and are never pressured into anything. Thank you very much and here's to many more years!

reviews.author: Inga Prigge
reviews.text: Last year, I consulted with Ms. Hexel about an insurance policy. The consultation and her expertise convinced me to take out and sign the policy with her. She is always there to help me with any questions or problems I may have. Thank you so much!

reviews.author: Michael Bremer
reviews.text:
Mr. Neubert and his team are very professional, reliable, and friendly.

The excellent and easy-to-understand advice, without any pressure to buy anything, was particularly noteworthy. I felt very well cared for and taken seriously.

Thank you for that, and I can highly recommend Mr. Neubert and his team.

reviews.author: Annette Schneider
reviews.text:
We've been with Ergo for years, and Mr. Neubert has always given us excellent advice. He's always personally available when questions or problems arise and always finds a quick and easy solution.

Thank you so much for the kind service and advice.

Best regards from Pampow, the Jarchows and Schneiders :)

reviews.author: CO-DING
reviews.text: We are extremely happy with Mr. Neubert and his team. They are always friendly, take the time to address our concerns, and answer them competently and clearly. Thank you for the excellent service!

Highly recommended. Mr. Neubert and his team are fantastic.
He explains everything clearly, and you don't have to worry about anything :)

If you need information or advice, everyone at the agency is always friendly, helpful, and you'll receive excellent advice on everything.
My wife and I have been customers of ERGO Versicherung Andy Mathes in Schwerin for many years.

I highly recommend ERGO Versicherung Andy Mathes.

Unfortunately, I can't give more than 5 stars. Thanks to the great team.

reviews.author: Peggy Zorn
reviews.text: I am very satisfied with the price-performance ratio of Ergo insurance and also with my contact person. Very friendly and nice. If anything came up, they always tried their best to resolve it. Highly recommended.

reviews.text: I've been a customer of their comprehensive service for many years. I'm kept informed about improvements and necessary contract adjustments. They're very competent and I've recommended them to others multiple times. Thank you so much! 🙏🫂

reviews.author: Anja Pundt-Bohm
reviews.text: Competent, trustworthy, and super-friendly advice, along with great products and services. We feel very well looked after and can recommend ERGO Insurance. Thumbs up!

reviews.author: Calin Gajda
reviews.text:
Always open to any questions, takes plenty of time for his clients.

Always a listening ear for any concerns. Very good at addressing issues that are really bothering you. Before appointments, he even thinks things through himself and considers different approaches.

You feel very well taken care of.

reviews.author: Su R
reviews.text: Wir hatten schon bei seinem Vorgänger Herrn Sievers eine Reihe unserer Versicherungen. Beim Übergang haben wir sehr ausführlich alle Details der Verträge und  die aktuelle Situation besprochen. Gerade aktuell hatten wir einen Skiunfall in Österreich und er hat uns unkompliziert und sehr zügig bei der Schadensmeldung geholfen. Wir fühlen uns sehr gut betreut und wissen das wir bei Fragen jederzeit eine kompetente Antwort erhalten. Genau deshalb schätze ich sehr einen konkreten Ansprechpartner zu haben und nicht irgendwo in einer Hotline in der Warteschleife zu hängen.

reviews.author: Sylvia Gorff
reviews.text: I can only report positive experiences. Superb, competent advice. He also takes ample time for the consultation. There's no attempt to "push" anything extra on you. Mr. Ott answers all questions in a way that even a layperson can understand. Keep up the good work!

reviews.author: Kirsten Dassow
reviews.text: I received excellent and competent advice. All my questions were answered very professionally. Mr. Ott is very dedicated, and I wish him all the best and hope he continues to advise many more customers so well.

reviews.author: Anna-Luise Kahlstorff-Tugend
reviews.text: Fabian Ott is a very friendly and competent consultant. He always answers questions professionally and takes enough time to do so. We are very satisfied.

reviews.author: Ingrid Fürstenberg
reviews.text: Excellent advice and always open to all questions. Good and quick assistance with claims and their settlement.

reviews.author: Marianne Hübner
